[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000011010 3
1 111001101 6
2 110101010 5
3 001010011 4
4 100001000 2
5 101110111 7
6 011100101 5
7 000011010 3

01 10 001010000 2
12 21 000000000 a
23 32 100000000 1
34 43 001100101 4
45 54 000000000 a
56 65 000001000 1
67 76 011000100 3
70 07 001010100 3

02 20 100001000 2 match 4
13 31 001010011 4 match 3
24 42 000000000 a
35 53 000010010 2
46 64 011000101 4
57 75 000010010 2
60 06 101001100 4
71 17 001010010 3

03 30 101010100 4
14 41 001000001 2
25 52 000001000 1
36 63 101000101 4
47 74 011100100 4
50 05 000011000 2
61 16 001000001 2
72 27 000000000 a

04 40 001000100 2
15 51 000010010 2
26 62 100001000 2 match 4
37 73 001110110 5
